name: Perfect Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the gelatin in cold water.
2. Add the dissolved gelatin, sugar replacement, and salt to hot water; stir until fully dissolved.
3. Mix in lemon juice, cucumber, carrots, and onion.
4. Beat together cream cheese and mayonnaise until smooth.
5. Blend the mixture with the vegetables.
6. Pour into a mold and chill.
Food Exchange per serving: 1/2 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
Calories: 73
Source: The Complete Diabetic Cookbook by Mary Jane Finsand
